name: Stuffed Zucchini, Turkish Style
recipeIngredient: 1 tablespoon Fresh, chopped dill (or 3/4 teaspoon dried dill weed)
recipeInstructions:
1. Scoop out the insides of the zucchini to leave a 1/2-inch rim.
2. Chop the innards into small bits and cook in butter with onions, garlic, salt, and pepper until onions are soft.
3. Combine the cooked mixture with flour, cheeses, herbs, and beaten eggs. Season with additional salt and pepper.
4. Fill the zucchini cavities with the mixture and dust the tops with paprika.
5. Bake at 375°F for 30 minutes or until the filling solidifies.
6. Serve with a fresh tomato salad.
From "The Moosewood Cookbook", 1977.
